constraint_random_test.name: case3_simple_constraints
hard_constraints: payloads are padded to AXI_DATA_WIDTH/8 bytes before comparison
cfg_enable is asserted before payload traffic
a directed cfg_reset occurs between the main payload run and a short post-reset run

objective.primary: run a simple reproducible VCS/cocotb sanity and coverage test for case3

vcs_execution_model.method: cocotb reads this JSON, drives segmented stream payloads, samples functional bins, and uses AxiRam for the AXI backing store; VCS reports line and branch coverage via URG.
